data.name: After Hours: Lines of Desire - S1
data.detailed_description:
Every message is a threat. Every touch is leverage.

A choice-driven adult visual novel where desire, jealousy, and manipulation collide—and one wrong answer can change everything.

When the lights go down, the masks come off.

After Hours: Lines of Desire is a mature, choice-driven visual novel that blends psychological tension, emotional intimacy, and mystery into one escalating story of control, vulnerability, and obsession.

You play as Abel, a man trying to keep his life balanced while everything around him starts to fracture.
A confusing relationship turns into a dangerous triangle. Then another. Then a secret.
And while emotions get messier, an unknown number keeps sending messages that feel less like warnings—and more like surveillance.

The deeper you go, the harder it is to tell who wants to protect you, who wants to possess you, and who is quietly setting the board for something much bigger.

A Story Built on Pressure and Consequence

What starts as attraction quickly becomes a power game.

  • Bella offers emotional closeness—but trust with her is fragile.

  • Monroe is poised, intelligent, and always one step ahead.

  • Clara begins as a threat, then becomes something far more complicated.

  • Riley brings risk, curiosity, and dangerous timing.

Every conversation shifts momentum. Every silence says something.
The tension is not just about who you choose—it’s about what each choice costs.

What to Expect

  • Branching narrative choices that shape relationships and tone

  • A persistent “choices are remembered” structure with visible emotional consequences

  • Strong focus on character dynamics, manipulation, loyalty, and desire

  • A layered mystery/threat line running through the romance

  • Multi-chapter story flow with escalating stakes and season-level payoff

  • Atmospheric presentation designed for dramatic, late-night visual novel pacing

No Safe Route

In this world, honesty can wound, lies can protect, and passion can be weaponized.
You can delay consequences. You can hide intent.
But eventually, every choice comes due.

After Hours: Lines of Desire is about what happens when people stop pretending they’re in control.

data.short_description: After Hours is a choice-driven visual novel that focuses on the best parts of life. An adult visual novel about desire after dark. Navigate relationships, temptation, and betrayal as one night leads to choices that can’t be undone. Your journey will be filled with comedy, drama, and plenty of sex.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 繁體中文, 日文, 韓文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 捷克文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.15 or better
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 12 MB 可用空間
